window_summary: This window tracks the recent github/spec-kit release stream from v0.5.1 through v0.9.0, capturing the rapid iteration of the Spec Kit CLI with new features, community extensions, presets, and integrations.

chunks.title: Spec Kit - 0.5.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: github/spec-kit
Release: Spec Kit - 0.5.1
Tag: v0.5.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-08T22:50:24Z; created_at: 2026-04-08T22:50:12Z
Release notes:
## Install
```bash
uv tool install specify-cli --from git+https://github.com/github/spec-kit.git@v0.5.1
specify init my-project
```
## What's Changed
- chore: bump version to 0.5.1
- fix: pin typer>=0.24.0 and click>=8.2.1 to fix import crash (#2136)
- feat: update fleet extension to v1.1.0 (#2029)
- fix(forge): use hyphen notation in frontmatter name field (#2075)
- fix(bash): sed replacement escaping, BSD portability, dead cleanup in update-agent-context.sh (#2090)
- Add Spec Diagram community extension to catalog and README (#2129)
- feat: Git extension stage 2 — GIT_BRANCH_NAME override, --force for existing dirs, auto-install tests (#1940) (#2117)
- fix(git): surface checkout errors for existing branches (#2122)
- Add Branch Convention community extension to catalog and README (#2128)
- docs: lighten March 2026 newsletter for readability (#2127)
- fix: restore alias compatibility for community extensions (#2110) (#2125)
- Added March 2026 newsletter (#2124)
- Add Spec Refine community extension to catalog and README (#2118)
- Add explicit-task-dependencies community preset to catalog and README (#2091)
- Add toc-navigation community preset to catalog and README (#2080)
- fix: prevent ambiguous TOML closing quotes when body ends with `"` (#2113) (#2115)
- fix speckit issue for trae (#2112)
- feat: Git extension stage 1 — bundled `extensions/git` with hooks on all core commands (#1941)
- Upgraded confluence extension to v.1.1.1 (#2109)
- Update V-Model Extension Pack to v0.5.0 (#2108)
- Add canon extension and canon-core preset. (#2022)
- [stage2] fix: serialize multiline descriptions in legacy TOML renderer (#2097)
- [stage1] fix: strip YAML frontmatter from TOML integration prompts (#2096)
- Add Confluence extension (#2028)
- fix: accept 4+ digit spec numbers in tests and docs (#2094)
- fix(scripts): improve git branch creation error handling (#2089)
- Add optimize extension to community catalog (#2088)
- feat: add "VS Code Ask Questions" preset (#2086)
- Add security-review v1.1.1 to community extensions catalog (#2073)
- Add `specify integration` subcommand for post-init integration management (#2083)
- Remove template version info from CLI, fix Claude user-invocable, cleanup dead code (#2081)
- fix: add user-invocable: true to skill frontmatter (#2077)
- fix: add actions:write permission to stale workflow (#2079)
- feat: add argument-hint frontmatter to Claude Code commands (#1951) (#2059)
- Update conduct extension to v1.0.1 (#2078)
- chore(deps): bump astral-sh/setup-uv from 7.6.0 to 8.0.0 (#2072)
- chore(deps): bump actions/configure-pages from 5 to 6 (#2071)
- feat: add spec-kit-fixit extension to community catalog (#2024)
- chore: release 0.5.0, begin 0.5.1.dev0 development (#2070)
- feat: add Forgecode agent support (#2034)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the github/spec-kit release v0.5.1, the project bumps the version to 0.5.1 and includes fixes such as pinning typer>=0.24.0 and click>=8.2.1 to resolve an import crash, and using hyphen notation in frontmatter name fields. It adds features like updating the fleet extension to v1.1.0, Git extension stage 2 with GIT_BRANCH_NAME override and --force for existing directories, and a new `specify integration` subcommand for post-init integration management. Several community extensions are added to the catalog, including Spec Diagram, Branch Convention, Spec Refine, explicit-task-dependencies, toc-navigation, canon, Confluence, optimize, VS Code Ask Questions, security-review, conduct, spec-kit-fixit, and others. The release also includes fixes for sed replacement escaping, ambiguous TOML closing quotes, and YAML frontmatter stripping in TOML integration prompts.

Repository: github/spec-kit
Release: Spec Kit - 0.6.0
Tag: v0.6.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-09T19:15:10Z; created_at: 2026-04-09T19:14:55Z
Release notes:
## Install
```bash
uv tool install specify-cli --from git+https://github.com/github/spec-kit.git@v0.6.0
specify init my-project
```
## What's Changed
- chore: bump version to 0.6.0
- Add Bugfix Workflow community extension to catalog and README (#2135)
- Add Worktree Isolation extension to community catalog (#2143)
- Add multi-repo-branching preset to community catalog (#2139)
- Readme clarity (#2013)
- Rewrite AGENTS.md for integration architecture (#2119)
- docs: add SpecKit Companion to Community Friends section (#2140)
- feat: add memorylint extension to community catalog (#2138)
- chore: release 0.5.1, begin 0.5.2.dev0 development (#2137)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the github/spec-kit release v0.6.0, the version is bumped to 0.6.0. This release adds several community extensions to the catalog: Bugfix Workflow, Worktree Isolation, multi-repo-branching preset, memorylint, and SpecKit Companion. It rewrites AGENTS.md for integration architecture and improves README clarity.

Repository: github/spec-kit
Release: Spec Kit - 0.6.1
Tag: v0.6.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-10T21:19:38Z; created_at: 2026-04-10T21:19:25Z
Release notes:
## Install
```bash
uv tool install specify-cli --from git+https://github.com/github/spec-kit.git@v0.6.1
specify init my-project
```
## What's Changed
- chore: bump version to 0.6.1
- feat: add bundled lean preset with minimal workflow commands (#2161)
- Add Brownfield Bootstrap extension to community catalog (#2145)
- Add CI Guard extension to community catalog (#2157)
- Add SpecTest extension to community catalog (#2159)
- fix: bundled extensions should not have download URLs (#2155)
- Add PR Bridge extension to community catalog (#2148)
- feat(cursor-agent): migrate from .cursor/commands to .cursor/skills (#2156)
- Add TinySpec extension to community catalog (#2147)
- chore: bump spec-kit-verify to 1.0.3 and spec-kit-review to 1.0.1 (#2146)

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the github/spec-kit release v0.6.1, the version is bumped to 0.6.1. A bundled lean preset with minimal workflow commands is added. Community extensions added include Brownfield Bootstrap, CI Guard, SpecTest, PR Bridge, TinySpec, and Status Report. The release migrates Cursor agent from .cursor/commands to .cursor/skills, bumps spec-kit-verify to 1.0.3 and spec-kit-review to 1.0.1, and fixes bundled extensions to not have download URLs.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the github/spec-kit release v0.7.2, the version is bumped to 0.7.2. Documentation is expanded with core commands reference, workflows reference, presets reference, extensions reference, and integrations FAQ. The memorylint and superpowers-bridge versions are updated to 1.3.0 with new download URLs. An integration catalog feature is added for discovery, versioning, and community distribution. Repository: github/spec-kit

## Install

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the github/spec-kit release v0.7.3, the version is bumped to 0.7.3. Shell-based context updates are replaced with marker-based upsert. A Community Friends page is added to the docs site. The Spec Scope extension is added to the community catalog. The Blueprint extension is registered in the community catalog. The preset-fiction-book-writing is updated to v1.5.0. A fix suppresses CRLF warnings in auto-commit.ps1, and reference/*.md is added to docfx content glob.

Repository: github/spec-kit
Release: Spec Kit - 0.7.4
Tag: v0.7.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-21T16:43:03Z; created_at: 2026-04-21T16:42:49Z
Release notes:
## Install
```bash
uv tool install specify-cli --from git+https://github.com/github/spec-kit.git@v0.7.4
specify init my-project
```
## What's Changed
- chore: bump version to 0.7.4
- fix(copilot): use --yolo to grant all permissions in non-interactive mode (#2298)

- Add spec-validate to community catalog (#2274)
- feat: register Ripple in community catalog (#2272)

- Add memory-loader to community catalog (#2284)

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the github/spec-kit release v0.7.4, the version is bumped to 0.7.4. For Copilot, --yolo is used to grant all permissions in non-interactive mode. Academic citation support is added with CITATION.cff and .zenodo.json. Community extensions added include spec-validate, Ripple, version-guard, spec-reference-loader, and memory-loader. UTF-8 BOM is stripped when reading agent context files. The Antigravity (agy) layout is migrated to .agents/ and --skills is deprecated. The preset fiction book writing is updated to v1.6.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: github/spec-kit
Release: Spec Kit - 0.7.5
Tag: v0.7.5; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-22T21:22:53Z; created_at: 2026-04-22T21:22:39Z
Release notes:
## Install
```bash
uv tool install specify-cli --from git+https://github.com/github/spec-kit.git@v0.7.5
specify init my-project
```
## What's Changed
- chore: bump version to 0.7.5
- fix: resolve skill placeholders for all SKILL.md agents, not just codex/kimi (#2313)
- feat(cli): add specify self check and self upgrade stub (#2316)
- Update version-guard to v1.1.0 (#2318)
- docs: move community presets from README to docs/community (#2314)
- catalog: add wireframe extension (v0.1.1) (#2262)
- Move community walkthroughs from README to docs/community (#2312)
- docs(readme): list red-team in community-extensions table (#2311)
- feat(catalog): add red-team extension to community catalog (#2306)
- Add superpowers-bridge community extension (#2309)
- feat: implement preset wrap strategy (#2189)
- fix(agents): block directory traversal in command write paths (#2229) (#2296)
- chore: release 0.7.4, begin 0.7.5.dev0 development (#2299)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the github/spec-kit release v0.7.5, the version is bumped to 0.7.5. Skill placeholders are resolved for all SKILL.md agents, not just codex/kimi. CLI commands `specify self check` and `self upgrade` are added as stubs. The version-guard extension is updated to v1.1.0. Community presets are moved from README to docs/community. The wireframe extension (v0.1.1) is added to the catalog. The red-team and superpowers-bridge community extensions are added. A preset wrap strategy is implemented. Directory traversal in command write paths is blocked.

chunks.title: Spec Kit - 0.8.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: github/spec-kit
Release: Spec Kit - 0.8.0
Tag: v0.8.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-23T15:09:33Z; created_at: 2026-04-23T15:08:49Z
Release notes:
## Install
```bash
uv tool install specify-cli --from git+https://github.com/github/spec-kit.git@v0.8.0
```
## What's Changed
- chore: bump version to 0.8.0
- feat(presets): Composition strategies (prepend, append, wrap) for templates, commands, and scripts (#2133)
- feat(copilot): support `--integration-options="--skills"` for skills-based scaffolding (#2324)
- docs(install): add pipx as alternative installation method (#2288)
- Add Memory MD community extension (#2327)
- Update version-guard to v1.2.0 (#2321)
- fix: `--force` now overwrites shared infra files during init and upgrade (#2320)
- chore: release 0.7.5, begin 0.7.6.dev0 development (#2322)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the github/spec-kit release v0.8.0, the version is bumped to 0.8.0. Composition strategies (prepend, append, wrap) for templates, commands, and scripts are added for presets. Copilot supports `--integration-options="--skills"` for skills-based scaffolding. Pipx is added as an alternative installation method. The Memory MD community extension is added. The version-guard extension is updated to v1.2.0. The --force flag now overwrites shared infra files during init and upgrade.

chunks.title: Spec Kit - 0.8.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: github/spec-kit
Release: Spec Kit - 0.8.1
Tag: v0.8.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-24T17:39:40Z; created_at: 2026-04-24T17:39:27Z
Release notes:
## Install
```bash
uv tool install specify-cli --from git+https://github.com/github/spec-kit.git@v0.8.1
specify init my-project
```
## What's Changed
- chore: bump version to 0.8.1
- fix(plan): use .specify/feature.json to allow /speckit.plan on custom git branches (#2305) (#2349)
- feat(vibe): migrate to SkillsIntegration from the old prompts-based MarkdownIntegration (#2336)
- docs: move community presets table to docs site, add missing entries (#2341)
- docs(presets): add lean preset README and enrich catalog metadata (#2340)
- fix: resolve command references per integration type (dot vs hyphen) (#2354)
- Update product-forge to v1.5.1 in community catalog (#2352)
- chore(deps): bump astral-sh/setup-uv from 8.0.0 to 8.1.0 (#2345)
- fix: replace xargs trim with sed to handle quotes in descriptions (#2351)
- feat: register jira preset in community catalog (#2224)
- feat: Preset screenwriting (#2332)
- chore: release 0.8.0, begin 0.8.1.dev0 development (#2333)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the github/spec-kit release v0.8.1, the version is bumped to 0.8.1. A fix allows /speckit.plan to use .specify/feature.json on custom git branches. The Vibe integration migrates to SkillsIntegration from the old prompts-based MarkdownIntegration. Community presets table is moved to docs site, and the lean preset README is added. Command references are resolved per integration type (dot vs hyphen). The product-forge extension is updated to v1.5.1. The jira preset and screenwriting preset are registered in the community catalog.

```bash

specify init my-project
```

## What's Changed

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the github/spec-kit release v0.8.2, the version is bumped to 0.8.2. The MarkItDown Document Converter extension is added to the community catalog. The Speckit preset fiction book is updated to v1.7 with support for RAG (Chroma DB) offline semantic search. Extensions use explicit UTF-8 encoding when reading manifest YAML. The m365 community extension is added. Documentation replaces deprecated --ai flag with --integration. GitHub-hosted catalog and download requests are authenticated with GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN. The extensify extension is updated to v1.1.0. The --no-git flag is deprecated, gated at v0.10.0. The Spec Orchestrator extension is added.

Repository: github/spec-kit
Release: Spec Kit - 0.9.0
Tag: v0.9.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-06-01T15:36:13Z; created_at: 2026-06-01T15:35:53Z
Release notes:
## Install
```bash
uv tool install specify-cli --from git+https://github.com/github/spec-kit.git@v0.9.0
specify init my-project
```
## Notice
We have migrated agent context updates to the agent-context extension and currently auto-enable it to preserve existing behavior. This compatibility fallback is deprecated and will be removed in v0.12.0; after that, explicitly enable/configure agent-context to continue automatic context updates.
## What's Changed
- chore: bump version to 0.9.0
- chore: recompile workflow lock files (#2774)
- Add Multi-Sites Spec Kit extension to community catalog (#2791)
- Update Product Spec Extension to v0.8.3 (#2790)
- Publish May 2026 Newsletter (#2787)
- fix: move URL install confirmation prompt before spinner (#2783) (#2784)
- Update Reqnroll BDD extension to v1.1.0 (#2775)
- Extract agent context updates into bundled agent-context extension (#2546)
- chore(deps): bump actions/setup-dotnet from 5.2.0 to 5.3.0 (#2755)
- chore: release 0.8.18, begin 0.8.19.dev0 development (#2766)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the github/spec-kit release v0.9.0, the version is bumped to 0.9.0. Agent context updates are migrated to the agent-context extension, which is auto-enabled to preserve existing behavior; this compatibility fallback is deprecated and will be removed in v0.12.0. The Multi-Sites Spec Kit extension is added to the community catalog. The Product Spec Extension is updated to v0.8.3. The May 2026 Newsletter is published. A fix moves the URL install confirmation prompt before the spinner. The Reqnroll BDD extension is updated to v1.1.0.

questions.query_text: In the github/spec-kit releases, which release adds the `specify integration` subcommand for post-init integration management?

answer_support.answer_text: Add `specify integration` subcommand for post-init integration management

questions.query_text: Across the github/spec-kit releases, how does the agent context update mechanism change between v0.8.18 and v0.9.0?

options.text: v0.8.18 adds support for SPECKIT_WORKFLOW_RUN_ID override, while v0.9.0 migrates agent context updates to the agent-context extension and deprecates the old behavior.
v0.8.18 removes agent context updates entirely, while v0.9.0 reintroduces them via a new extension.
Both releases only update community extension versions without changing agent context handling.
v0.8.18 introduces the agent-context extension, while v0.9.0 removes it.

questions.expected_answer: v0.8.18 adds support for SPECKIT_WORKFLOW_RUN_ID override, while v0.9.0 migrates agent context updates to the agent-context extension and deprecates the old behavior.

answer_support.answer_text: Support is added for SPECKIT_WORKFLOW_RUN_ID override
Agent context updates are migrated to the agent-context extension, which is auto-enabled to preserve existing behavior; this compatibility fallback is deprecated and will be removed in v0.12.0.

questions.query_text: In the github/spec-kit release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds the `specify integration` subcommand, (2) a release that adds a workflow engine with catalog system, (3) a release that adds composition strategies (prepend, append, wrap) for presets, (4) a release that migrates agent context updates to the agent-context extension.

answer_support.answer_text: Add `specify integration` subcommand for post-init integration management
Add workflow engine with catalog system
Composition strategies (prepend, append, wrap) for templates, commands, and scripts are added for presets
Agent context updates are migrated to the agent-context extension
